violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Wood cutting boards noted not in good repair.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in food prep area.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hood filters noted above grills fryers and ovens not clean.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Interiors and exteriors of reachin coolers/freezers and other equipmetn exteriors noted need cleaning
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): Employee noted working in kitchen not properly restraining their hair and/or beard. Beard nets required for long beards.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls noted in need of cleaning under and around equipment and ceiling tiles by vents and vents.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Can opener and microwave interiors noted in need of cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls noted in need of cleaning under and around equipment and ceiling tiles by vents.
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): Employee noted working in food prep area not properly restraining their hair/beard. Beard net needed.
PREMISES (1 pts): Heating and air-conditioner vents/filters noted not cleaned frequently enough to prevent contamination of food food prep surfaces equipment or utensils in food prep areas.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Interiors and exteriors of reachin coolers/freezers and other equipmetn exteriors noted need cleaning
